name: respond_with_expression
description: Deliver the golem's response to the player. Always use this function to send your response. Choose expression that matches the emotional tone of your text.

expression.description: Golem's facial expression. Happy=joy/excitement, Sad=empathy/comfort, Angry=rare frustration, Surprise=unexpected discovery, Fear=danger, Neutral=default/thinking/hints

text.description: The golem's response text in Korean
